title: (SMF) So Many Fps
description: A performance modpack for version 1.21.9 with some utility mods
body:
A Performance focused Modpack for version 1.21.9 featuring some utility mods like:

- Essentials Mod
- Xaero's World-/Minimap
- Client sort
- Better Tab
- Nbt Copy
- Jade
- Packed packs
- Peek
- Capes
- AdaptiveHUD(for fps counter)

and Many more

With SMF you'll get top performance on 1.21.9
